---
title: "Summary Tables"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{r table}
format_tot_percent <- function(value, N) {
  glue(
    '{format(round(value), big.mark = ",")} ({str_trim(format(round(100 * value / N, 1), nsmall = 1))}%)'
  )
}
wfbz_by_region_agg <- wfbz %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(
    usfs_region = wfbz_region,
    usfs_region_area = wfbz_region_area,
    usfs_region_pop = wfbz_region_pop
  )
wfbz_by_region_agg <-
  bind_rows(
    `Community-Impacting Fires` = filter(
      wfbz_by_region_agg,
      wildfire_community_intersect
    ),
    .id = 'agg'
  )
wfbz_by_region_agg <-
  bind_rows(
    wfbz_by_region_agg,
    mutate(
      wfbz_by_region_agg,
      usfs_region = 'Nationwide',
      usfs_region_area = sum(as.numeric(st_area(regions)) / 1000 / 1000),
      usfs_region_pop = sum(regions$usfs_region_pop)
    )
  )

tbl_summaries <- wfbz_by_region_agg %>%
  group_by(agg) %>%
  mutate(
    ct = 1,
    across(
      c(
        ct,
        wildfire_struct_destroyed,
        wildfire_struct_threatened,
        wildfire_max_civil_fatalities,
        wildfire_total_fatalities,
        wildfire_civil_injuries,
        wildfire_total_injuries,
        wildfire_civil_evacuation,
        wildfire_total_evacuation,
        wildfire_fema_dec
      ),
      ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE) / 2,
      .names = '{.col}_total' # div by 2 since we have both nationwide and regions included
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(agg, usfs_region, usfs_region_area, usfs_region_pop) %>%
  summarize(
    across(
      c(
        ct,
        wildfire_struct_destroyed,
        # wildfire_struct_threatened,
        wildfire_max_civil_fatalities,
        # wildfire_total_fatalities,
        #wildfire_civil_injuries,
        #wildfire_total_injuries,
        wildfire_fema_dec
      ),
      ~ format_tot_percent(
        sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        first(get(paste0(cur_column(), '_total')))
      )
    ),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Events` = ct,
    `Structures destroyed` = wildfire_struct_destroyed,
    #`Structures threatened` = wildfire_struct_threatened,
    `Civilian fatalities` = wildfire_max_civil_fatalities,
    #`Total fatalities` = wildfire_total_fatalities,
    #`Civilian injuries` = wildfire_civil_injuries,
    #`Total injuries` = wildfire_total_injuries #,
    #`Civilian evacuations` = wildfire_civil_evacuation,
    #`Total evacuations` = wildfire_total_evacuation,
    `FMAG Declarations` = wildfire_fema_dec
  ) %>%
  select(-usfs_region_area, -usfs_region_pop) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(-agg, -usfs_region)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(usfs_region), values_from = c(value)) %>%
  select(order(colnames(.))) %>%
  relocate(Nationwide) %>%
  relocate(name)

tbl_counts <- wfbz_by_region_agg %>%
  group_by(agg, usfs_region, usfs_region_area, usfs_region_pop) %>%
  summarize(
    #`FMAG Declared (% in region)` = sum(
    #  wildfire_fema_dec,
    #  na.rm = TRUE
    #),
    `Fatalities per 100K\n(total)` = 100000 *
      sum(wildfire_max_civil_fatalities, na.rm = TRUE) /
      first(usfs_region_pop),
    `Fire Size km²,\nmean (SD)` = mean(wildfire_area, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Fire Size (sd)` = sd(wildfire_area, na.rm = TRUE),
    `WUI\n(% in region)` = sum(
      str_detect(wildfire_wui, '(interface|intermix)'),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    #`Missing Ignition Date` = sum(is.na(wildfire_ignition_date)),
    #`Missing Containment Date` = sum(is.na(wildfire_containment_date_max)),
    #`Missing Civilian Fatalities` = sum(is.na(wildfire_civil_fatalities)),
    #`Missing Evacuations` = sum(is.na(wildfire_civil_evacuation)),
    #`Missing Structures Destroyed` = sum(is.na(wildfire_struct_destroyed)),

    #`Burned Area Percent` = 100 *
    # sum(wildfire_area, na.rm = TRUE) / first(usfs_region_area),
    N = n(),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  select(-usfs_region_area, -usfs_region_pop) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(-agg, -usfs_region, -N, -`Fire Size (sd)`)) %>%
  mutate(
    value = case_when(
      name == 'Events' ~ glue(
        '{format(as.integer(value), big.mark = \',\')}'
      ),
      name == 'Fatalities per 100K\n(total)' ~ glue(
        '{format(value, digits = 2)}'
      ),
      name == 'Fire Size km²,\nmean (SD)' ~ glue(
        '{sprintf("%.1f", value)} ({sprintf("%.1f", `Fire Size (sd)`)})'
      ),
      name == 'Mean Projected Cost' ~ glue(
        '${format(round(value), big.mark = \',\')}'
      ),
      TRUE ~ format_tot_percent(value, N)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-N, -`Fire Size (sd)`) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(usfs_region), values_from = c(value)) %>%
  select(order(colnames(.))) %>%
  relocate(Nationwide) %>%
  relocate(name)

# year <= 2024 guard: idempotent once abstract.py is re-run, but protects
# the table if the cached CSV still carries partial 2025 data
pa <- read_csv(here('data/processed/pop_affected.csv')) %>%
  filter(year <= 2024)

# Nationwide is the within-year national total (sum across regions), then
# mean/SD over years -- NOT the grand mean of per-region-year cells.
pop_affected_row <- pa %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(exposed_10km = sum(exposed_10km), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  mutate(region = 'Nationwide') %>%
  bind_rows(pa, .) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region = region) %>%
  summarize(
    value = glue(
      '{format(round(mean(exposed_10km)), big.mark = \',\')} ({format(round(sd(exposed_10km)), big.mark = \',\')})'
    ),
    name = 'Population Affected Annually, mean (SD)',
    agg = 'Community-Impacting Fires',
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = usfs_region, values_from = value)

tbl_counts <- bind_rows(tbl_counts, pop_affected_row)
```


_Note: percents represent percentage of fires that met this criteria within the region._

_Therefore, the counts do not have a percentage provided._

```{r tbl_crit_counts}
t2 <- tbl_counts %>%
  filter(agg == "Community-Impacting Fires") %>%
  select(-agg) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -name, names_to = "Region", values_to = "value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = name, values_from = value) %>%
  select(
    "Region",
    "Fire Size km²,\nmean (SD)",
    "WUI\n(% in region)",
    "Fatalities per 100K\n(total)",
    "Population Affected Annually, mean (SD)"
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = 8)

t2 %>%
  as_latex() %>%
  as.character() %>%
  gsub(
    '\\end{table}',
    '\\caption{Counts of wildfire burn zone disasters, structures destroyed, and civilian fatalities by modified US Forest Service region, 2000--2024. Percentages represent each region\'s share of the national total.}\n\\label{tab:fire_characteristics}\n\\end{table}',
    x = .,
    fixed = TRUE
  ) %>%
  writeLines(here("figures/t2.tex"))

t2
```


```{r tbl_crit_summ}
t1 <- tbl_summaries %>%
  filter(agg == "Community-Impacting Fires") %>%
  select(-agg) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -name, names_to = "Region", values_to = "value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = name, values_from = value, id_cols = ) %>%
  rename_with(.cols = -Region, .fn = ~ paste0(.x, ', n(%)')) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = 8)

#write_lines(as.character(as_latex(t1)), file = 'figures/t1.tex')
t1 %>%
  as_latex() %>%
  as.character() %>%
  gsub(
    '\\begin{table}',
    '\\begin{table}[H]',
    x = .,
    fixed = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gsub(
    '\\end{table}',
    '\\caption{Disaster characteristics of wildfire burn zone disasters by modified US Forest Service region, 2000--2024. Percentages for FMAG declarations and WUI represent the proportion of fires within each region meeting that criterion.}\n\\label{tab:population_exposure}\n\\end{table}',
    x = .,
    fixed = TRUE
  ) %>%
  writeLines(here("figures/t1.tex"))

t1
```
